title: How did ChudTheBuilder’s bond payment end JiDion and Alex Rosen’s partnership? Inside the growing controversy
summary_full: JiDion has ended his partnership with Alex Rosen after Rosen donated $10,000 toward controversial streamer ChudTheBuilder’s bond. JiDion announced the split in his June 4 video This Is The End, saying the decision went against his values. The fallout has sparked major debate online, with supporters praising JiDion’s move and critics questioning why the split happened now.
